item.title: 2027 Super Bowl Odds: Bettors Backing Broncos-Bears Title Game
item.description: Super Bowl LXI betting has already begun. And at one book, bettors are already anticipating an alliterative championship game.

item.title: Kansas State Coach Jerome Tang: 'These Dudes Don't Deserve to Wear This Uniform'
item.description: Head coach Jerome Tang ripped the Kansas State Wildcats after their embarrassing 91-62 home loss to the Cincinnati Bearcats.

item.title: 2026 NFL Draft: How Raiders HC Klint Kubiak Can Maximize Fernando Mendoza’s Potential
item.description: The Raiders now have their coach and the No. 1 pick to choose their franchise quarterback. Here's how the expected pairing could work.

item.title: Power Play: Honda, Chevrolet Commit to New INDYCAR Engine in 2028
item.description: Honda and Chevrolet are committed to INDYCAR, which means more tug-of-war on the track in 2028 and beyond.

item.title: 8 World Baseball Classic Matchups We Can't Wait To See
item.description: These are the can't-miss games of the 2026 World Baseball classic pool stage.
